name: Blackened Chicken with Caesar Salad (Fdgn81a)
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts halves, Skined and deboned
recipeInstructions:
------------
FOR SALAD:
1. Combine 2 oz Anchovies, Fresh lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, Chopped fresh parsley, Dijon style mustard, Freshly ground black pepper, Crushed garlic clove, and Olive oil in a bowl.
2. Whisk in grated Parmesan cheese until well combined.
3. Toss the dressing with mixed salad greens.
FOR CHICKEN:
1. Stir Italian Dressing and white wine together in a shallow dish to blend; add chicken; marinate for 1 hour, turning several times.
2. Finely grind marjoram, oregano, thyme, salt, black pepper, and ground red pepper using a coffee grinder or mini food processor.
3. Coat the chicken with the seasoning mixture on both sides, shaking off excess.
4. Preheat a cast iron skillet over high heat until smoking for 5-10 minutes.
5. Pour melted butter over each piece of chicken.
6. Reduce heat to medium and cook chicken for 3-5 minutes per side until cooked through.
7. Slice the chicken and serve on top of the Caesar salad.
